transcription.text: Can you tell me where I can get cash with this? Um... You go down the middle way and you make a right. A left! A left! A cash? You know, the thing is, with that card, I don't know where. That's the problem. Looking for cash without MasterCard isn't exactly easy. And there's a closet store there. Now you go through that closet store, they don't buy. But with MasterCard, you can get cash just about anywhere. At nearly 200,000 bank branches and 60,000 ATMs. So count on MasterCard and master the moment. Dirt road.
